title: To Myself
lyrics: He's back! And I worry about release And I worry about these bitches and these hoes All that I know, is a product of all I've seen And I, I, I, I, I, I, I, I am still Take, take, take, take, take, what is real And why, why, why, why, why do you pretend to be And why do I pretend to be someone else Worry about all the things that ain't nothing And I, I, I, I, I, I, I, I, I am still Take, take, take, take, take, what is real I dripped away I dripped away I dripped away
